ticket.text: Why can't I withdraw my money?

result.reply: Your account isn't verified yet, so withdrawals are on hold. Identity verification is usually completed within 3 business days after you upload a valid government ID and proof of address. I've opened a ticket for our team.

trace.name: search_kb
result: Account verification (KYC): identity verification is usually completed within 3 business days after you upload a valid government ID and proof of address. You can check your verification status in Settings.

trace.draft: Your account isn't verified yet, so withdrawals are on hold. Identity verification is usually completed within 3 business days after you upload a valid government ID and proof of address. I've opened a ticket for our team.
